nodes.context: Italian Camorra confederation created in the late 1970s to oppose the Nuova Camorra Organizzata.
Camorra organization led by Raffaele Cutolo, opposed by the Nuova Famiglia.
Sicilian criminal organization affiliated with the Nuova Famiglia.
Camorra clan led by Michele Zaza, part of the Nuova Famiglia coalition.
Camorra clan led by Carmine Alfieri, part of the Nuova Famiglia.
Camorra clan led by the Nuvoletta brothers, part of the Nuova Famiglia.
Camorra clan led by Luigi Giuliano, part of the Nuova Famiglia.
Camorra clan led by Antonio Bardellino, part of the Nuova Famiglia.
Camorra clan led by Michele D'Alessandro, part of the Nuova Famiglia.
Camorra clan led by Angelo Moccia, part of the Nuova Famiglia.
Camorra clan led by Pasquale Galasso, part of the Nuova Famiglia.
Camorra clan led by Valentino Gionta, part of the Nuova Famiglia.
Camorra clan led by Luigi Vollaro, part of the Nuova Famiglia.
Camorra clan involved in the conflict with NCO and later internal war.

edges.evidence_quote: The Nuova Famiglia ... was created ... to face Raffaele Cutolo's Nuova Camorra Organizzata
edges.context: Nuova Famiglia was formed to oppose the Nuova Camorra Organizzata.
Nuova Famiglia was affiliated with the Sicilian Mafia.

edges.evidence_quote: The confederation included: - Michele Zaza, boss of the powerful Zaza clan
edges.context: The Zaza clan was part of the Nuova Famiglia confederation.

edges.evidence_quote: The confederation included: - Carmine Alfieri, head of the Alfieri clan
edges.context: The Alfieri clan was part of the Nuova Famiglia confederation.

edges.evidence_quote: The confederation included: - Lorenzo, Angelo and Ciro Nuvoletta, bosses of the Nuvoletta clan
edges.context: The Nuvoletta clan was part of the Nuova Famiglia confederation.

edges.evidence_quote: The confederation included: - Luigi Giuliano, boss of the Giuliano clan
edges.context: The Giuliano clan was part of the Nuova Famiglia confederation.

edges.evidence_quote: The confederation included: - Antonio Bardellino, boss of the Casalesi clan
edges.context: The Casalesi clan was part of the Nuova Famiglia confederation.

edges.evidence_quote: The confederation included: - Michele D'Alessandro, head of the D'Alessandro clan
edges.context: The D'Alessandro clan was part of the Nuova Famiglia confederation.

edges.evidence_quote: The confederation included: - Angelo Moccia, boss of the Moccia clan
edges.context: The Moccia clan was part of the Nuova Famiglia confederation.

edges.evidence_quote: The confederation included: - Pasquale Galasso, head of the Galasso clan
edges.context: The Galasso clan was part of the Nuova Famiglia confederation.

edges.evidence_quote: The confederation included: - Valentino Gionta, boss the Gionta clan
edges.context: The Gionta clan was part of the Nuova Famiglia confederation.

edges.evidence_quote: The confederation included: - Luigi Vollaro, head of the Vollaro clan
edges.context: The Vollaro clan was part of the Nuova Famiglia confederation.

edges.evidence_quote: war broke out among the anti-NCO coalition, in particular between the Nuvoletta clan from Marano and Antonio Bardellino at the end of 1983
edges.context: The Nuvoletta clan and the Casalesi clan fought an internal war after defeating the NCO.

edges.evidence_quote: With Carmine Alfieri siding with Bardellino’s Casalesi clan
edges.context: The Alfieri clan allied with the Casalesi clan during the internal war.

edges.evidence_quote: the Gionta clan allied with Nuvoletta
edges.context: The Gionta clan allied with the Nuvoletta clan during the internal war.
Infobox lists Nuova Camorra Organizzata as a rival.
Infobox lists Sicilian Mafia as an ally.
